name: LINE：ディズニー ツムツム

detail.description:
This easy puzzle game, where you collect and connect Tsum Tsum stuffed animals, popular at Disney Store, is now available on LINE!
Everyone's favorite Disney characters, like Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck, and Winnie the Pooh, are all here!
It's super easy to play—just connect three Tsum stuffed animals!
There are so many different types of Tsum, so collect them and have fun!

[How to Play]
Just trace and connect three or more Tsum of the same character before time runs out.
